case_title: SUE ALBRITTON ROBBINS VS. RODNEY ALLEN PARKER ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$15.00) SERVED DEC-14-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, RODNEY ALLEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBBINS, SUE ALBRITTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKER, RODNEY ALLEN $525.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-31-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SUE ALBRITTON ROBBINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS RODNEY ALLEN PARKER AND JAFAR LAWRENCE WOODS ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES HER CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT JAFAR LAWRENCE WOODS AS THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON HIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
